content.en:
In the following days, Ye Tian continued to shuttle in the primordial Black Sea, positioning again and again.

After a long time, he has left countless anchor points in his mind, turning into a starry sky map, and each star point is a positioning.

"Enough, with so many positioning locations, I can enter one of the positioning positions of the Primordial Black Sea at will, and I have comprehended the three extreme extreme paths, even if it is a perfect controller of the extreme realm who has comprehended one extreme extreme path, they may not be able to track me!" Ye Tian muttered.

It can be said that his current ability to save his life has increased dramatically.

"It's a pity that there are no other treasures that contain the power of the Extreme Extreme!"

Ye Tian said regretfully.

And treasures such as the fragments of mysterious armor, the original empty golden stone, and the golden grass of the extreme mango were all useless to him.

Although he felt that the limit realm could continue to improve, and he had not yet reached the real limit, these things were useless, and if he relied on himself to slowly comprehend, he didn't know how many billions of years it would take to make a slight progress.

Therefore, he will no longer comprehend the Extreme Path of Space, the Extreme Path of Defense, and the Extreme Path of Light.

"Next, let's slowly look for other treasures like the Extreme Miscanthus Golden Grass!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to create a top-notch extreme control technique of the defensive class.

After all, he had already comprehended the extreme level of defense, and it was very easy to create a top-notch extreme control technique of the defense class.

It took some years for a top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique to be successfully created by Ye Tian.

Primordial Black Sea.

Ye Tian was here to test the newly created top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique, and one of his will clones and a copy body all came here.

I saw that the copy body performed the top extreme control technique, and the black light merged into the body, and the body turned black.

At this time, the will clone held the Extreme Dao Treasure Destroying Dao Sword and exerted part of the power of the Extreme Mang Sword Light, and slammed into the replica body with one blow.

Rumble!

The replica body was knocked flying by a blow, but nothing happened.

"My body blocked the Extreme Sword Light, it seems that the top defensive Extreme Dao Control Technique created this time is very good, and the defense ability is very strong!"

Ye Tian said with satisfaction.

Immediately, he named this defensive class's top extreme control technique the Black Pole Body.

At this point, Ye Tian now has three top extreme path control techniques, namely the extreme sword light, the black extreme body, and the extreme empty fist, and the three top extreme path control skills have made his strength improve again.

"My current strength is definitely comparable to the top True Realm Perfect Controller!"

Ye Tian estimated.

......

In the following years, Ye Tian searched for treasures similar to Extreme Mango White Grass, but he had no clue.

He had also asked the Lord of the Ancients where there would be a treasure similar to the Extreme Mangwhite Grass at the end of the realm, but the answer he got was that he couldn't find it.

Even if there were, no one would take it out, and it would have been refined a long time ago.

And the Lord of the Ancient and the Lord of the Daoless Path, they don't have it, they haven't gotten it.

Therefore, on the side of the Realm, it was almost unrealistic for Ye Tian to find a treasure similar to the Extreme Mango White Grass.

As for the last time I found the Mysterious Armor Fragment from the Space-Time Fragment of the Demon Dragon Tower, that kind of good luck will never be found again.

"I have to look for an opportunity from the deep sea of the Extreme Path!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

On this side of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, some extremely powerful True Realm Perfect Controllers have obtained treasures similar to the Extreme Mangbai Grass, although many of them have been refined, or contributed to the big people of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

But at the very least, in the Extreme Deep Sea, it is easier to obtain such treasures.

this day.

Ye Tian chatted with the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

Ye Tian's current strength with the Void Sparrow body was already very strong, not weaker than the main body, but the strength he showed was only the perfect controller of the Void Realm.

But even so, the speed of his growth shocked the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

Moreover, he had treated the daughter of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, so he had a good relationship with the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

Ye Tian also often came to find the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

"Lord of the Ice Phoenix, I had seen the Primordial Void Golden Stone before, and only later did I know that this treasure could allow Extreme Dao creatures to comprehend the Extreme Spatial Extreme Dao. Where can I buy a treasure like this?" Ye Tian pretended to be a newcomer and asked.

"Buy?" the Lord of the Ice Phoenix said with a smile, "This kind of treasure can't be bought, even those big people in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace are rushing to ask for it." Although a piece of Primordial Void Golden Stone could not help a Perfection Controller of the Extreme Realm comprehend the Extreme Spatial Extreme Dao at all. But they have been collecting such treasures, collecting too much, and after spending a long time slowly comprehending them, maybe they will suddenly comprehend the ultimate path. It is said that once you comprehend the extreme path, your strength will skyrocket a lot, and you will almost be killed. In short, it is too difficult to obtain such a treasure, and it is impossible to buy it at all. Even I have never snatched such a treasure, but I have seen it many times. "

"Isn't there any hope?"

Ye Tian said curiously.

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix said: "The main thing is to find it, but it doesn't have enough strength, and once it's exposed, it can't be saved." Therefore, even if many Extreme Dao creatures are lucky enough to obtain such a treasure, they will never say it. "

"It turns out that such treasures are so rare, it would be good if you saw a few more. Ye Tian said with emotion.

"If it's just a matter of seeing, there's really hope!" said the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, "Not long after, there will be an auction in the Extreme Dao Demon Domain, and among them there will be a treasure called the Cause and Effect Purple Flower, this Cause and Effect Purple Flower contains some extreme cause and effect extreme power. This news is only publicized among the True Realm Perfect Controllers, and has not yet spread. However, many of the big names of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace have already booked this causal purple flower, and the competition will be very fierce. "

"Extreme Dao Demon Domain, why is it located there? I remember that the Extreme Dao Demon Domain is a place similar to the Extreme Dao Source Sea, and it is also a special area opened up by the Extreme Dao Deep Sea powerhouses, but too powerful Extreme Dao creatures are not allowed to enter there. "

Ye Tian said with some surprise.

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix said, "That's right, at most, the Extreme Dao Demon Domain only allows the perfect controller of the Void Realm to enter, and does not allow the existence above the True Realm to enter. And the Extreme Dao creature that auctioned the Cause and Effect Purple Flower was a perfect controller of the Void Realm, and he entered the Extreme Dao Demon Domain for auction, because he was afraid that the news that he had the Cause and Effect Purple Flower would be leaked, and any big man could destroy him, so as to rob him of his treasures. And in the Extreme Demon Domain, his strength also belongs to the top existence, and he is not afraid of being assassinated. Moreover, although the Extreme Dao Demon Domain is chaotic, in the Extreme Dao Demon City, the order there is very stable. At present, that Extreme Dao creature is in the Extreme Demon City, and many representatives of the big names have entered the Extreme Demon City, just waiting for the auction to begin. "

"Then I'm going to go over and take a look!"

Ye Tian decided.

"Be careful, maybe there's a fight there!" reminded the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

"Thank you Lord of the Ice Phoenix for reminding me, I understand, and my strength is also very good, there are not many existences among the perfect controllers of the Void Realm who can kill me. Ye Tian said confidently.

Binghuang knew some of Ye Tian's strength, so he didn't persuade him anymore.

However, she didn't know that the strength that Ye Tian showed was just an insignificant bit of strength.

Ye Tian's real strength is even stronger than her!
